headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on AMETEK, Raises Price Target to $235
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Christopher Snyder   maintains AMETEK (NYSE:AME) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $215 to $235.
